'''Om-Thaim''' was a company that created a wide variety of [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generators]] for [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], including [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]].
